meaning: adj.[医]可植入的 可移植的:
examples: Implantable Smart Chip Fights Chronic pain.
Treatment for heart arrhythmias also may involve use of an implantable device.
The company is developing a proprietary implantable medical device to treat acid reflux.
Only one implantable-defibrillator patient in five ends up needing a jolt to the heart.
Security experts have noted that implantable medical devices, such as pacemakers, are vulnerable to attack.
